headline: 4 GARP Stocks That Investors Can Scoop Up for Maximum Returns
summary: Try the GARP strategy when seeking a profitable portfolio of stocks offering optimum value and growth investing. NVDA, RL, RMD and GE hold promise.

headline: ResMed Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: ResMed is set to announce its third-quarter earnings soon, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by double digits.
